languages.text:
Все бафф способности Master Tactician имеют доп. эффекты.
При применении на союзных демонов они получают бонус (2 x Fellowship bonus) к пробитию брони и + 3 MP.
При применении на союзников или самого Урална они получают бонус к урону, равный их Heretic Rank.
При нахождении под эффектом Fervour Уралон может использовать Linchpin, Inspire и Strongpoint не только к себе. Finish the Job Уралона наносит полный урон.

traits.locale_text:
Все бафф способности Master Tactician имеют доп. эффекты.
При применении на союзных демонов они получают бонус (2 x Fellowship bonus) к пробитию брони и + 3 MP.
При применении на союзников или самого Урална они получают бонус к урону, равный их Heretic Rank.
При нахождении под эффектом Fervour Уралон может использовать Linchpin, Inspire и Strongpoint не только к себе. Finish the Job Уралона наносит полный урон.

languages.text:
All supporting Master Tactician abilities possess additional effects. Whenever used on allies or Uralon himself, they grant a damage bonus that equals their Heretical rank. If the target of the ability is an allied daemon, it also gains +<u>(2 × FEL bonus)</u>% armour penetration and +3 MP.
Whenever affected by {g|f:305858b91e6e4d89bff75431fa6030e6}Fervour{/g}, Uralon can target others with {g|f:ca8040427b6d4a3d859991b62609b318}Linchpin{/g}, {g|f:b34dd87c65af46c69c35502e3e1cfe93}Inspire{/g}, and {g|f:70ab234e53764c85a6f3d19de7bb182d}Strongpoint{/g}. Uralon's {g|f:5b8545bc7a90491d865410a585071efe}Finish the Job{/g} deals full damage.

traits.locale_text:
All supporting Master Tactician abilities possess additional effects. Whenever used on allies or Uralon himself, they grant a damage bonus that equals their Heretical rank. If the target of the ability is an ally daemon, it also gains +<u>(2 × FEL bonus)</u>% armour penetration and +3 MP.
Whenever affected by {g|f:305858b91e6e4d89bff75431fa6030e6}Fervour{/g}, Uralon can target others with {g|f:ca8040427b6d4a3d859991b62609b318}Linchpin{/g}, {g|f:b34dd87c65af46c69c35502e3e1cfe93}Inspire{/g} and {g|f:70ab234e53764c85a6f3d19de7bb182d}Strongpoint{/g}. Uralon's {g|f:5b8545bc7a90491d865410a585071efe}Finish the Job{/g} deals full damage.

Whenever affected by {g|f:305858b91e6e4d89bff75431fa6030e6}Fervour{/g}, Uralon can target others with {g|f:ca8040427b6d4a3d859991b62609b318}Linchpin{/g}, {g|f:b34dd87c65af46c69c35502e3e1cfe93}Inspire{/g}, and {g|f:70ab234e53764c85a6f3d19de7bb182d}Strongpoint{/g}. Uralon's {g|f:5b8545bc7a90491d865410a585071efe}Finish the Job{/g} deals full damage.

languages.text:
Все направленные на поддержку способности мастера-тактика приобретают дополнительные эффекты. Если цель — союзник или сам Уралон, то она получает бонус к урону, равный ее рангу Еретика. Если цель способности — союзный демон, он также получает +<u>(2 × бонус ОБЩ)</u>% пробития брони и +3 ОП.
Сделав себя целью {g|f:305858b91e6e4d89bff75431fa6030e6}Рвения{/g}, Уралон может применять {g|f:ca8040427b6d4a3d859991b62609b318}Внутренний стержень{/g}, {g|f:b34dd87c65af46c69c35502e3e1cfe93}Напутствие{/g} и {g|f:70ab234e53764c85a6f3d19de7bb182d}Тактическое восстановление{/g} не только к себе, но и к союзникам. Способность Уралона {g|f:5b8545bc7a90491d865410a585071efe}Завершить начатое{/g} наносит полный урон.
languages.original_text:
All supporting Master Tactician abilities possess additional effects. Whenever used on allies or Uralon himself, they grant a damage bonus that equals their Heretical rank. If the target of the ability is an allied daemon, it also gains +<u>(2 × FEL bonus)</u>% armour penetration and +3 MP.
Whenever affected by {g|f:305858b91e6e4d89bff75431fa6030e6}Fervour{/g}, Uralon can target others with {g|f:ca8040427b6d4a3d859991b62609b318}Linchpin{/g}, {g|f:b34dd87c65af46c69c35502e3e1cfe93}Inspire{/g}, and {g|f:70ab234e53764c85a6f3d19de7bb182d}Strongpoint{/g}. Uralon's {g|f:5b8545bc7a90491d865410a585071efe}Finish the Job{/g} deals full damage.

languages.text:
Toutes les capacités de soutien du maître tacticien possèdent des effets supplémentaires. Utilisées sur des alliés ou Uralon lui-même, elles confèrent un bonus de dégâts égal à leur rang Hérétique. Si la cible de la capacité est un démon allié, il obtient également +<u>(2 × bonus de SOC)</u> % de pénétration d'armure et +3 PD.
Sous l'effet de {g|f:305858b91e6e4d89bff75431fa6030e6}Ferveur{/g}, Uralon peut cibler les autres avec {g|f:ca8040427b6d4a3d859991b62609b318}Pilier{/g}, {g|f:b34dd87c65af46c69c35502e3e1cfe93}Inspiration{/g} et {g|f:70ab234e53764c85a6f3d19de7bb182d}Bastion{/g}. Sa capacité {g|f:5b8545bc7a90491d865410a585071efe}Finir le travail{/g} inflige l'intégralité de ses dégâts.
languages.original_text:
All supporting Master Tactician abilities possess additional effects. Whenever used on allies or Uralon himself, they grant a damage bonus that equals their Heretical rank. If the target of the ability is an allied daemon, it also gains +<u>(2 × FEL bonus)</u>% armour penetration and +3 MP.
Whenever affected by {g|f:305858b91e6e4d89bff75431fa6030e6}Fervour{/g}, Uralon can target others with {g|f:ca8040427b6d4a3d859991b62609b318}Linchpin{/g}, {g|f:b34dd87c65af46c69c35502e3e1cfe93}Inspire{/g}, and {g|f:70ab234e53764c85a6f3d19de7bb182d}Strongpoint{/g}. Uralon's {g|f:5b8545bc7a90491d865410a585071efe}Finish the Job{/g} deals full damage.

languages.text:
Tüm destekleyici Usta Taktisyen kabiyetleri, ilave etkilere sahiptir. Dost birimler veya Uralon üzerinde kullanıldığında Kâfirce kademesi kadar hasar bonusu kazandırır. Kabiliyetin hedefi dost bir iblisse bu iblis ayrıca +%<u>(2 × SYL bonusu)</u> zırh delme değeri ve +3 HP kazanır.
Uralon; {g|f:305858b91e6e4d89bff75431fa6030e6}Hararet{/g} kabiliyeti etkisindeyken {g|f:ca8040427b6d4a3d859991b62609b318}Yıkılmaz Direk{/g}, {g|f:b34dd87c65af46c69c35502e3e1cfe93}İlham{/g} ve {g|f:70ab234e53764c85a6f3d19de7bb182d}Direnek Noktası{/g} kabiliyetlerini başkaları üzerinde kullanabilir. Uralon'un {g|f:5b8545bc7a90491d865410a585071efe}İşi Bitir{/g} kabiliyeti tam hasar verir.
languages.original_text:

languages.text:
战术专家的所有支援型能力具有额外效果。对盟友或乌拉隆自己使用时，提供等同于其异端主义等级的伤害加值。若该能力目标是友方恶魔，该恶魔还将获得<u>（2×社交加值）</u>%的护甲穿透和3点移动点数。
受{g|f:305858b91e6e4d89bff75431fa6030e6}战术狂热{/g}影响时，乌拉隆可对其他人使用{g|f:ca8040427b6d4a3d859991b62609b318}关键战术{/g}、{g|f:b34dd87c65af46c69c35502e3e1cfe93}鼓舞人心{/g}和{g|f:70ab234e53764c85a6f3d19de7bb182d}战术枢纽{/g}。乌拉隆的{g|f:5b8545bc7a90491d865410a585071efe}完成任务{/g}造成全额伤害。
languages.original_text:
All supporting Master Tactician abilities possess additional effects. Whenever used on allies or Uralon himself, they grant a damage bonus that equals their Heretical rank. If the target of the ability is an allied daemon, it also gains +<u>(2 × FEL bonus)</u>% armour penetration and +3 MP.
Whenever affected by {g|f:305858b91e6e4d89bff75431fa6030e6}Fervour{/g}, Uralon can target others with {g|f:ca8040427b6d4a3d859991b62609b318}Linchpin{/g}, {g|f:b34dd87c65af46c69c35502e3e1cfe93}Inspire{/g}, and {g|f:70ab234e53764c85a6f3d19de7bb182d}Strongpoint{/g}. Uralon's {g|f:5b8545bc7a90491d865410a585071efe}Finish the Job{/g} deals full damage.

languages.text:
Todas las capacidades de apoyo de maestro táctico poseen efectos adicionales. Cuando se utilicen sobre aliados o sobre el propio Uralon, otorgan una bonificación al daño equivalente a su rango de Hereje. Si el objetivo de la capacidad es un daemon aliado, también gana un +<u>(2 × bonificación por EMP)</u> % de penetración de armadura y +3 PM.
Cada vez que se ve afectado por {g|f:305858b91e6e4d89bff75431fa6030e6}Fervor{/g}, Uralon puede seleccionar a otros personajes como objetivos de {g|f:ca8040427b6d4a3d859991b62609b318}Punto de referencia{/g}, {g|f:b34dd87c65af46c69c35502e3e1cfe93}Inspiración{/g} y {g|f:70ab234e53764c85a6f3d19de7bb182d}Posición fortificada{/g}. La capacidad {g|f:5b8545bc7a90491d865410a585071efe}Terminar el trabajo{/g} de Uralon inflige el daño completo.
languages.original_text:
All supporting Master Tactician abilities possess additional effects. Whenever used on allies or Uralon himself, they grant a damage bonus that equals their Heretical rank. If the target of the ability is an allied daemon, it also gains +<u>(2 × FEL bonus)</u>% armour penetration and +3 MP.
Whenever affected by {g|f:305858b91e6e4d89bff75431fa6030e6}Fervour{/g}, Uralon can target others with {g|f:ca8040427b6d4a3d859991b62609b318}Linchpin{/g}, {g|f:b34dd87c65af46c69c35502e3e1cfe93}Inspire{/g}, and {g|f:70ab234e53764c85a6f3d19de7bb182d}Strongpoint{/g}. Uralon's {g|f:5b8545bc7a90491d865410a585071efe}Finish the Job{/g} deals full damage.

languages.text:
Alle unterstützenden Fähigkeiten des Meistertaktikers haben zusätzliche Effekte. Werden sie Verbündeten oder Uralon selbst gewährt, verursachen sie Bonusschaden in Höhe ihres Ketzer-Ranges. Ist das Ziel der Fähigkeit ein verbündeter Dämon, erhält er außerdem +<u>(2 × GEF-Bonus)</u> % Rüstungsdurchdringung und +3 BP.
Ist er mit {g|f:305858b91e6e4d89bff75431fa6030e6}Eifer{/g} belegt, kann Uralon Verbündete mit {g|f:ca8040427b6d4a3d859991b62609b318}Herzstück{/g}, {g|f:b34dd87c65af46c69c35502e3e1cfe93}Inspirieren{/g} und {g|f:70ab234e53764c85a6f3d19de7bb182d}Stützpunkt{/g} belegen. Uralons {g|f:5b8545bc7a90491d865410a585071efe}Die Aufgabe erledigen{/g} verursacht vollen Schaden.
languages.original_text:
All supporting Master Tactician abilities possess additional effects. Whenever used on allies or Uralon himself, they grant a damage bonus that equals their Heretical rank. If the target of the ability is an allied daemon, it also gains +<u>(2 × FEL bonus)</u>% armour penetration and +3 MP.
Whenever affected by {g|f:305858b91e6e4d89bff75431fa6030e6}Fervour{/g}, Uralon can target others with {g|f:ca8040427b6d4a3d859991b62609b318}Linchpin{/g}, {g|f:b34dd87c65af46c69c35502e3e1cfe93}Inspire{/g}, and {g|f:70ab234e53764c85a6f3d19de7bb182d}Strongpoint{/g}. Uralons {g|f:5b8545bc7a90491d865410a585071efe}Die Aufgabe erledigen{/g} verursacht vollen Schaden.

languages.text:
すべての支援系マスタータクティシャン・アビリティは追加効果を持つ。味方またはウラロン自身に使用するたびに、その異端ランクに等しいダメージボーナスを付与する。アビリティの対象が味方のデーモンである場合、そのデーモンは+<u>(2 × FELボーナス)</u>%の装甲貫通および+3のMPも得る。
{g|f:305858b91e6e4d89bff75431fa6030e6}熱意{/g}の影響を受けている間、ウラロンは{g|f:ca8040427b6d4a3d859991b62609b318}要{/g}、{g|f:b34dd87c65af46c69c35502e3e1cfe93}鼓舞{/g}、{g|f:70ab234e53764c85a6f3d19de7bb182d}拠点{/g}で他者を対象にできる。ウラロンの{g|f:5b8545bc7a90491d865410a585071efe}仕事を終わらせろ{/g}は全ダメージを与える。
languages.original_text:
All supporting Master Tactician abilities possess additional effects. Whenever used on allies or Uralon himself, they grant a damage bonus that equals their Heretical rank. If the target of the ability is an allied daemon, it also gains +<u>(2 × FEL bonus)</u>% armour penetration and +3 MP.
Whenever affected by {g|f:305858b91e6e4d89bff75431fa6030e6}Fervour{/g}, Uralon can target others with {g|f:ca8040427b6d4a3d859991b62609b318}Linchpin{/g}, {g|f:b34dd87c65af46c69c35502e3e1cfe93}Inspire{/g}, and {g|f:70ab234e53764c85a6f3d19de7bb182d}Strongpoint{/g}. Uralon's {g|f:5b8545bc7a90491d865410a585071efe}Finish the Job{/g} deals full damage.

traits.locale_text:
すべての支援系マスタータクティシャン・アビリティは追加効果を持つ。味方またはウラロン自身に使用するたびに、その異端ランクに等しいダメージボーナスを付与する。アビリティの対象が味方のデーモンである場合、そのデーモンは+<u>(2 × FELボーナス)</u>%の装甲貫通および+3のMPも得る。
{g|f:305858b91e6e4d89bff75431fa6030e6}熱意{/g}の影響を受けている間、ウラロンは{g|f:ca8040427b6d4a3d859991b62609b318}要{/g}、{g|f:b34dd87c65af46c69c35502e3e1cfe93}鼓舞{/g}、{g|f:70ab234e53764c85a6f3d19de7bb182d}拠点{/g}で他者を対象にできる。ウラロンの{g|f:5b8545bc7a90491d865410a585071efe}仕事を終わらせろ{/g}は全ダメージを与える。
